# Khubaib Qaiser — Senior Software Engineer

> Khubaib Qaiser is a Senior Software Engineer with 11+ years of experience
> specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, React Native, and cloud
> infrastructure (AWS, GCP). Based in Islamabad, Pakistan. Available for
> senior/staff engineering roles, remote worldwide.

## Key Pages

- [About](https://khubaibqaiser.com/#about): Background, education, expertise summary
- [Skills](https://khubaibqaiser.com/#skills): Full technology stack with proficiency levels
- [Experience](https://khubaibqaiser.com/#experience): 11+ years across 6 companies
- [Projects](https://khubaibqaiser.com/projects): 30+ web and mobile projects with case studies
- [Resume](https://khubaibqaiser.com/resume): Downloadable ATS-optimized PDF resume
- [Contact](https://khubaibqaiser.com/#contact): Reach out for opportunities

## Specializations

React, Next.js, TypeScript, React Native, Node.js, AWS (Lambda, CDK, DynamoDB,
SQS, CloudFront), GCP, System Design, Performance Optimization, Tailwind CSS,
CI/CD, Headless CMS, Accessibility

## Experience Highlights

- Currently at Shopsense AI: Serverless ad-tech, 50K+ daily impressions, AWS CDK
- Previously at Achieve: 60% Core Web Vitals improvement, React 18 migration
- GudangAda: Design system used by 40+ engineers, Next.js + Contentful
- 6 companies across San Francisco, Austin, Jersey City, Jakarta, Islamabad
- Educational games reaching 500K+ students
